member.name: T:Unity.Media.RefHandle`1
member.summary: A class that handles the allocation and disposal of an object. All the different encoders use it.
member.typeparam: The type of object that the handle refers to.

member.name: P:Unity.Media.RefHandle`1.IsCreated
member.summary: Specifies whether the handle has been allocated or not.

member.name: P:Unity.Media.RefHandle`1.Target
member.summary: The target object of the handle.

member.name: M:Unity.Media.RefHandle`1.#ctor(`0)
member.param: The object to use as the target of the handle.

member.name: M:Unity.Media.RefHandle`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.param: If this is True, the method has been called by a user's code. Otherwise, it has been called by the runtime and only unmanaged resources can be disposed.
